    {
      "question": "What is the primary goal of scenario-based modeling in requirements engineering?",
      "options": ["A) To identify the functional requirements of the system", "B) To analyze the interaction between system and users", "C) To create a detailed design of the system", "D) To estimate the cost of development"],
      "correct": 1,
      "explanation": "Scenario-based modeling is used to identify the functional and non-functional requirements of the system
